title: Sour Velvet Vermicelli
description: A savory and tangy Malaysian dish featuring vermicelli rice noodles served with a side of fermented vegetables for a delightful brunch experience.
instructions: Rinse the vermicelli rice noodles under cold water and soak them in warm water for at least 30 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix soy sauce, vinegar, sesame oil, and salt. Adjust seasoning to your preference.
Drain the soaked vermicelli and set aside.
Add minced ginger into a pan with a bit of sesame oil over medium heat. Stir-fry for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Combine the drained vermicelli and the ginger mixture in the pan, tossing everything together to coat evenly with the sauce.
